display.purpose: The hero <h1> first/last name only. Last name in amber-light. Drops to 2.875rem below 400px.

headline.purpose: Every section <h2>. Always paired with a mono section number and a fading amber/violet rule.

title.purpose: Project card titles. Featured cards scale to 1.55rem; regular cards 1.125rem.

body.purpose: Hero description and primary reading body. Capped at max-width 32rem.

body-sm.purpose: Card body copy, problem text, project descriptions.

label.purpose: Tag chips, stack chips, status badges. Uppercase, never for sentences.

section-number.purpose: The 01 / 02 / 03 prefix in SectionHeader. Always amber or violet, never neutral.

shadows.name: card-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Canonical project-card hover. Warm amber, never neutral grey. Light-mode token resolves to 0 20px 60px rgba(15,23,42,0.10).

shadows.name: cta-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover lift, paired with translateY(-2px).

shadows.name: hero-photo-frame
shadows.purpose: The only resting shadow in the system. Reserved for hero photo frames.

shadows.name: nav-ambient
shadows.purpose: Floating glass nav bar's ambient lift. Same-hue-as-background, not coloured.

shadows.name: focus-ring-amber
shadows.purpose: Input focus ring. Always amber, 3px, 15% alpha. Replaces native outline.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Canonical ease for card hover lift, transforms, exponential-feeling state changes.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default for color/border/background transitions on buttons, chips, links.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Form input border/shadow transition. Tag hover.

motion.name: duration-mid
motion.purpose: Button hover state and shimmer overlay.

motion.name: duration-card
motion.purpose: Card lift, overlay opacity, nav top-offset on scroll.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: On-scroll reveal utility (.reveal → .visible). Translates 40px up + fades in.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Amber gradient CTA with shimmer overlay on hover and a -2px lift with warm glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; min-height: 3.25rem; padding: 0 1.5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.875rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F59E0B, #D97706); color: #0D0D0D; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-btn-primary::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: inherit; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FBBF24, #F59E0B); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.25s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover::before { opacity: 1; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(245,158,11,0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F59E0B; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary__inner { position: relative; z-index: 1; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: inherit; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Amber-on-transparent secondary CTA. Hover fills to 10% amber and saturates border.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-outline"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>Contact</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; min-height: 3rem; padding: 0 1.25rem; border: 1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.5); border-radius: 0.875rem; background: transparent; color: #F59E0B; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.25s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.1); border-color: #F59E0B; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F59E0B; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Amber Tag
components.description: The canonical skill/stack tag. Soft amber fill, uppercase letter-spaced label.
components.css: .ds-tag-amber { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(245,158,11,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.25); color: #FBBF24; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Neutral Tag
components.description: Secondary metadata chip (year, category). Muted, low contrast on purpose.
components.css: .ds-tag-neutral { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 5px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: rgba(248,250,252,0.5); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Active Filter Chip
components.description: Selected filter state. Pill-shaped, amber fill, amber text, with optional close affordance.
components.html: <button class="ds-active-chip">React<svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"><line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-active-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 3px 8px 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; background: rgba(245,158,11,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.3); color: #F59E0B; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-active-chip:hover { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.2); } .ds-active-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F59E0B; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Flat at rest, lifts 6px with warm amber glow on hover. Glass surface over graphite base.
components.html:
Saferpay integration

A Swiss banking processor needed PSP integration across three editions without breaking existing checkout flows.
components.css: .ds-card-project { display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-card-project:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(245,158,11,0.15); } .ds-card-project__image { min-height: 10.5rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(245,158,11,0.12), rgba(124,58,237,0.08)); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-card-project__body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; padding: 1.25rem; } .ds-card-project__title { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; color: #F8FAFC; font-family: 'Archivo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.18; } .ds-card-project__problem { margin: 0; color: rgba(248,250,252,0.5); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; line-height: 1.55; }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Glass-tinted text field with amber focus ring (3px, 15% alpha). Outline removed in favor of the ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 8px; color: #F8FAFC; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #F59E0B; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(245,158,11,0.15); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(248,250,252,0.3); }

components.name: Floating Glass Nav Bar
components.description: Fixed top with side margins, 14px backdrop-blur, ambient page-tinted shadow.
components.html:
CG
ProjectsAboutContact
Book a call
components.css: .ds-nav-bar { position: fixed; top: 1rem; left: 1rem; right: 1rem; z-index: 50; max-width: 72rem; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; padding: 0.8125rem 1rem 0.8125rem 1.125rem; border: 1px solid rgba(248,250,252,0.09); border-radius: 1.125rem; background: rgba(12,12,24,0.82); box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(8,8,16,0.62); backdrop-filter: blur(14px) saturate(1.08); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-bar__logo { color: #F8FAFC; font-family: 'Archivo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.125rem; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-nav-bar__links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.25rem; } .ds-nav-bar__links a { color: rgba(248,250,252,0.7); font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-bar__links a:hover { color: #F59E0B; } .ds-nav-bar__cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 1rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F59E0B, #D97706); color: #0D0D0D; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease; } .ds-nav-bar__cta:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(245,158,11,0.35); }

components.name: Section Header
components.description: Signature structural rhythm: mono number + Archivo Black h2 + fading amber rule. Repeated identically on every primary section.
components.css: .ds-section-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 4rem; } .ds-section-header__num { color: #F59E0B; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0; } .ds-section-header__title { margin: 0; color: #F8FAFC; font-family: 'Archivo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2.25rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-section-header__rule { flex: 1; height: 1px; margin-left: 1rem; background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(245,158,11,0.3), transparent); }

narrative.overview:
A dark workshop with a single warm work-light overhead. The surface is graphite, almost black, faintly violet under the lamp. Amber is the only light in the room: it falls on the work, not on the worker. Nothing decorative, nothing demonstrative. The interface is a tool, not a stage.

The system is built around restraint as the seniority signal. Type is set in Archivo (display) and Space Grotesk (body) with high weight contrast (400 → 900) and a tight scale. Section headers are numbered in mono, like notebook entries. The amber accent does heavy work but appears on ≤10% of any given screen: the last name in the hero, the primary CTA, the section numbers, focus rings, hover lifts. Hovers are gentle: a 2px lift, a warm amber glow, never a slam. Surfaces are translucent glass (backdrop-filter: blur(8px)) over the graphite base; light mode swaps to warm-white with the same chroma logic inverted.

The system explicitly rejects: pastel-gradient dev-portfolio templates, the SaaS hero-metric template, neon-on-black "futuristic dev" cosplay, and McKinsey-style navy-and-gold corporate gravitas.
keyCharacteristics: Amber on graphite, never amber on amber, never amber on white.
Numbered, mono-labeled sections (01, 02, 03) as the structural rhythm.
Glass surfaces with warm-amber glow on hover; no neutral grey shadows.
High weight contrast in type (400 body, 900 display); flat scale forbidden.
One accent color carries the entire identity. Secondary hues (violet, teal, green, purple) appear only as semantic role colors, never as decoration.

rules.name: The One Light Rule
rules.body: Workbench Amber appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point. If a screen reads as "amber", reduce until amber reads as a punctuation mark, not a color field.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Extreme Rule
rules.body: #000 and #fff are forbidden. Use Graphite Black (#080810, faint violet) and Text Primary Dark (#F8FAFC, faint blue). Every neutral is tinted.

rules.name: The Brand-Override Exception
rules.body: LinkedIn blue, Calendly blue, Telegram blue, WhatsApp green are platform-mandated and do not theme. They appear only on the corresponding contact-thread CTAs and are excluded from the One Light Rule.

rules.name: The 1.25-Step Rule
rules.body: Adjacent type roles must differ by at least 1.25× in size OR by a weight class. Flat scales are forbidden.

rules.name: The Mono-For-Numbers-Only Rule
rules.body: Mono type appears exclusively on section numbers and inline code. Never on labels, never on body, never on CTAs.

rules.name: The No-Em-Dash Rule
rules.body: PRODUCT.md voice rule, enforced visually: no — and no -- in copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.

rules.name: The Warm-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every state-change shadow is amber-tinted, not neutral grey. Generic rgba(0,0,0,0.X) shadows are forbidden.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces do not lift until the user interacts. No resting drop-shadows on cards, tags, or buttons. The hero photo frame is the single intentional exception.

rules.name: The No-Glassmorphism-For-Decoration Rule
rules.body: The glass and glass-amber utilities are reserved for actually-functional surfaces (nav bar, mobile menu, photo card overlay). They are not a decorative finish.

dos: Do keep Workbench Amber under 10% of any screen. The accent is rare on purpose.
Do use the numbered + mono section header on every primary section. The rhythm is the brand.
Do use warm amber-tinted shadows for state changes. Cool grey shadows look generic.
Do lift cards by -6px and buttons by -2px on hover. Same easing (cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1) or ease 0.25s). Subtle, consistent.
Do tint every neutral. Graphite Black (#080810) for backgrounds, Text Primary Dark (#F8FAFC) for foreground. Never #000 or #fff.
Do name shipped systems by their actual name in copy (Saferpay, Onfido KYC, Section 508, App Store).
Do keep transitions ≤300ms and respect prefers-reduced-motion.
Do pair amber text with darker amber (#B45309, #92400E) in light mode for WCAG AA contrast.
Do keep body line length under 34rem max-width.
donts: Don't look or feel like a generic dev portfolio template: pastel gradients, tilted cards, floating GitHub icons, identical project tiles in a 3-up grid.
Don't cosplay a SaaS landing page: the hero-metric template, three-feature icon-card grid, testimonial slider, corner gradient blob.
Don't go crypto / neon-cyber futuristic dev: neon on black, glowing borders, matrix rain, decorative terminal-green.
Don't project corporate consultant gravitas: stock photos, enterprise solutions, navy-and-gold, McKinsey-style stiff serif headlines.
Don't add a border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards, callouts, or list items.
Don't apply background-clip: text with a gradient to anything other than the existing brand wordmark gradient.
Don't use a third saturated color alongside amber. Violet/teal/green are semantic roles only.
Don't introduce flat type scales. Adjacent roles must differ by ≥1.25× in size or a weight class.
Don't use em dashes (— or --) in any copy, ever.
Don't restate the section heading in the first line of body copy below it.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Use transform and opacity.
Don't ease with bounce or elastic curves. Use ease-out exponentials.
